description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a flat roof and a combination of large glass panels and solid wall sections. The structure is divided into two main sections: a larger, more private area and a smaller, open communal space with visible greenery and outdoor seating. The exterior is characterized by a mix of neutral tones, including gray and white, complemented by natural wood accents and landscaped gardens. Multiple trees and shrubs are integrated into the property, enhancing its connection to nature. The windows are generously sized and arranged asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding environment. The overall layout suggests a focus on open-plan living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a mix of gray, white, and wood finishes. The design emphasizes open spaces and strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, landscaped garden, and a prominent flat roof with large windows and greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the outdoor communal area, visible trees, and the transition between the main building and the open space.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full extent of the flat roof, back garden, and additional glass panels for natural light.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the secondary entrance, more greenery, and the integration of outdoor and indoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass panels
